title: Simple Low Fire
description: Re-Textures The Fire To Look More Low, Simple & Slow!
body:
## What Is This? This Is a Resource Pack That Contains `Simple Low Fire`. This Pack Makes The Fire Look More Low, Slow, & More Simple. All These Things Combine To Make The Fire Less Distractive & Less Annoying!
Features 1. Lowers The Fire So It Doesnt't Disrupt Your View
2. Makes the Fire Look More Simpler By Simplifying The Fire Texture
3. Slows Down The Fire So It Doesn't Overwhelm Your Eyes By Going 60 FPS Smooth
FAQ

1. Why Does The Pack Show "Incompatible Version" & Is Red?


Ans: You Might Be On a Version That Is Not Listed Inside The Pack So It Shows Up As Incompatible Version. Every Resource Pack Of Mine Starts From Version 1.20.1 & Goes Upto Whatever The Latest Is, It Might Support The Older Versions Aswell But Its Not Guaranteed To Work. You Should Try It First Then If It Works Then Yay, If It Doesn't... Well Then It Doesn't!
